message:
fix(oom): share wasm virtual files via arc and fix utf8 read truncation

- **pi_wasm**: Resolved a massive OOM vulnerability where  (up to 64MB each) were deep-copied for every WebAssembly instance. By wrapping the  in  and using  for copy-on-write during  and , read-only files (like large game assets) are safely shared across all 256 allowed instances, dropping theoretical max memory overhead from 16GB to 64MB.
- **main/extensions_js**: Fixed an edge-case crash where  on a  adapter would fail entirely with  if the byte limit happened to truncate a multi-byte UTF-8 character. Replaced with  into a  followed by  to gracefully retain valid data.
